creator: csjp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->patched

We no longer hold pcb locks over ip_output() in divert. This has 
been fixed in HEAD and RELENG_7, and I am currently working on a 
patch to merge to RELENG_6.  It should be noted that the multicast 
code received a much needed facelift in CURRENT and RELENG_7 so 
the patch that gets merged will be a bit different.
